template_data.sub: Getting a set-aside cert is a door key — not a contract. Here's what comes next.

image_prompt: Bold alert infographic. Dark navy background. Large stacked headline at top: 'CERTIFIED / DOESN'T MEAN / CONTRACTED' — last word in coral accent color. Center: illustrated professional figure in business suit holding a framed certificate, standing before a large federal building entrance door. Coral pill label top-left: 'CERT REALITY CHECK'. Right-side callout box with short bold label 'THE CERT IS A KEY'. Bottom dark banner strip with 1-line subtext. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
